item.description: Scientist with a coding skillset MS in Chemical Engineering. Interested in bioreactors, lab automation, and data. Moderate experience with SQL and Python. Some exerience with web dev (looking to develop more) and Azure. 🧪 Work Senior Scientist @ GSK (2021 - present) Upstream biopharmaceutical process development, specializing in technical aspects of micro-scale mammalian bioreactors (15mL, 250mL), and data projects across our department. Micro-scale bioreactor operation using Sartorius Ambr250HT 24-way bioreactor system: setup/teardown, programming, troubleshooting, training scientists.
